description_long: This is an acoustic guitar with a classic dreadnought body shape, featuring a blue outer edge and a natural wood finish on the back. The front soundboard is decorated with artistic linework, including a bird and wave motif, and has a black pickguard. The neck is a matching blue color, leading up to a headstock with six tuning pegs arranged three on each side. The back of the guitar displays a rich, dark wood grain, bordered by the same blue seen on the sides and neck. The guitar has a standard bridge and six strings, with visible frets along the fingerboard.
description: A blue and natural wood acoustic guitar with artistic linework, six strings, and a classic dreadnought shape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the decorated soundboard, black pickguard, six strings, and blue neck.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's blue edge and the thickness of the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dark wood back bordered by blue and the headstock with tuning pegs.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the blue edge and body depth.
attribute_headstock_design: Standard acoustic headstock with three tuning pegs on each side, no visible logo, and a rounded top.
